title: The spiritual brain: selective cortical lesions modulate human self-transcendence.

assets.abstract: The predisposition of human beings toward spiritual feeling, thinking, and behaviors is measured by a supposedly stable personality trait called self-transcendence. Although a few neuroimaging studies suggest that neural activation of a large fronto-parieto-temporal network may underpin a variety of spiritual experiences, information on the causative link between such a network and spirituality is lacking. Combining pre- and post-neurosurgery personality assessment with advanced brain-lesion map

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Visionary cosmologies — self-transcendence, mystical experience, numinous, awe, cosmic consciousness.
